differential_diagnoses: Meconium aspiration syndrome with air leak complications
Persistent pulmonary hypertension of the newborn
next_steps: Contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) of the chest
Consultation with pediatric thoracic surgery for biopsy or resection
Genetic counseling and testing for DICER1 syndrome
Serial monitoring of pulmonary status and follow-up echocardiography
Multidisciplinary review of imaging for architectural characterization

differential_diagnoses: Meconium aspiration syndrome with persistent air leak
Persistent pulmonary hypertension of the newborn
next_steps: Contrast-enhanced computed tomography of the chest to delineate anatomy and vascular supply
Pediatric thoracic surgery consultation for potential surgical excision of the malformation
Magnetic resonance angiography to evaluate for systemic arterial supply (if CT is contraindicated)
Genetic counseling and testing for DICER1 mutation
Bronchoscopy to evaluate for endobronchial obstruction or airway anomalies
Serial microbiological surveillance of respiratory secretions
